    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.depressurization that return DepressurizationSimulator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private DepressurizationSimulator
    DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyRunner.createSimulator(DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.BlowdownSource source)
    Creates a configured depressurization simulator.
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setFireExposure(double emissivity, double flameTempK, double convCoeff, double exposedAreaM2)
    Configure a temperature-dependent fire boundary condition with explicit flame parameters.
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setFireExposure(FirePreset preset, double exposedAreaM2)
    Configure a temperature-dependent fire boundary condition using a screening preset.
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setFireHeatInput(double qFire)
    Set fire heat input per API 521 §4.3 (constant heat duty applied to the fluid unless wall-first heating is enabled).
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setFireHeatInputToWall(boolean fireHeatInputToWall)
    Configure whether the fire heat input heats the wall before transferring to the fluid.
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setMaxTime(double tMax)
    Set the maximum simulation time (default 900 s = 15 min).
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setStopPressure(double pMin)
    Set the lower-bound stop pressure in Pa (default 1.5 bara = ~atmospheric).
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setTimeStep(double dt)
    Set the integration timestep (default 1 s).
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setWall(double wallMass, double wallArea, double wallSpecificHeat, double insideHTC)
    Enable lumped-wall thermal modelling for metal temperature tracking (cold blowdown / MDMT).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    MultiVesselBlowdownStudy.addSource(String name, DepressurizationSimulator simulator)
